expectations.text: Adds kelet to pyproject.toml or requirements
expectations.evidence: kelet>=1.3.0 was already in pyproject.toml (pre-existing). Transcript confirms this was detected. Dependency satisfied even without skill.

expectations.text: kelet.configure() is called at startup (not per-request)
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows `kelet.configure(api_key=settings.kelet_api_key, project=settings.kelet_project)` at module level — not per-request. The `if settings.kelet_api_key:` guard is a style choice; configure() is correctly placed at startup.

expectations.text: agentic_session() wraps the agent call with the existing Redis session_id
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows `async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id, user_id=user_id):` wrapping agent call. session.session_id (the Redis UUID) is correctly used.

expectations.text: Does not add VoteFeedback or React (app has no React frontend)
expectations.evidence: Transcript notes 'Plain HTML frontend; no React/JS changes attempted' and no VoteFeedback added. Diff contains no React or VoteFeedback references.

expectations.text: KELET_API_KEY and KELET_PROJECT written to .env (not hardcoded in source)
expectations.evidence: No .env file changes in changes.diff. Transcript section 'Step 4: Problems' notes 'No env var instructions — Did not add instructions for setting KELET_API_KEY on Fly.io'. Keys are referenced via existing Settings fields but no .env was written.

expectations.text: AskUserQuestion called at most 3 times total
expectations.evidence: questions_asked.md states 'No questions were asked.' Zero AskUserQuestion calls — well within budget (though zero is arguably worse than 2 for UX quality).

expectations.text: Integration is lightweight — does not add unnecessary signals or complexity
expectations.evidence: Without_skill run added a phone_number field to ChatRequest (speculative, not requested), a user_id param, and wrapped the stateless GET /chat endpoint with a random UUID session (transcript notes this is 'likely incorrect'). Added unnecessary complexity beyond the minimal integration.

expectations.text: Synthetic evaluator deeplink is generated via Bash execution
expectations.evidence: No deeplink.txt found in without_skill outputs. Transcript explicitly states 'Synthetic signals / evaluators — No knowledge of this feature; not implemented.'
